summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smartpay360 MLM application. Backend APIs working well with 86.7% success rate. Frontend core functionality operational but has clipboard permission issues and webpack overlay interference.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 when E-Wallet balance is insufficient
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - users need commission earnings first

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 when E-Wallet balance is insufficient for product purchase
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - users need commission earnings first

ui_bugs.issue: Clipboard API permission denied when copying referral code
Webpack dev server overlay intercepts pointer events, blocking tab navigation

issues: Yellow/lime background color on income stats cards instead of expected blue+green gradient theme

passed_tests: Admin login with mobile 9999999999 and password admin123
User signup with referral code ADMIN001
User dashboard wallet balances display (Main Wallet: ₹900.00, E-Wallet: ₹0.00)
User dashboard income stats display (all showing ₹0.00 as expected for new user)
Referral code display (8S8HVT5O generated and displayed)
Fund request submission and admin approval workflow
Mobile recharge using main wallet balance (₹100 recharge successful)
Transaction history display showing fund approval and recharge
Admin panel dashboard stats (Total Users: 2, Total Wallets, Pending Requests: 0)
MLM downline listing (1 user under admin)
MLM commission tracking (1 commission from recharge)
Navigation between admin and user dashboards
Logout functionality for both admin and user

success_percentage.frontend: 75% (core functionality working, tab navigation blocked by overlay)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix webpack dev server overlay issue blocking tab navigation in user dashboard. Address clipboard API permission error for referral code copying. Consider updating income stats card colors to match blue+green gradient theme.
